category_sources: Official fmscripts README describes wrapper scripts for FileMerge, including fmdiff, fmdiff3, fmmerge, and fmresolve.
source_facts.description says it uses FileMerge as a diff command for Subversion and Mercurial.
display_name_sources: Official fmscripts README lists fmdiff as one of the provided wrapper scripts.
source_facts.name is fmdiff and source_facts.executables include fmdiff.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs site found; the official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/brunodefraine/fmscripts, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official fmscripts README describes FileMerge wrapper scripts for diff and merge workflows.
source_facts.description identifies FileMerge, diff, Subversion, and Mercurial use.
